violations.text: There is no allergen statement present for consumer awareness. The menu must have a general allergen statement posted on all menus. New Violation. Correct By: 04/09/2025
No person in charge (certified in food safety management) was present as needed at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 04/09/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (slicer) was observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Slicer broken down and moved to warewashing area to be washed, rinsed, and sanitized. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/09/2025

The door to the outside, located in the back storage area, is not tight-fitting (cement chipping away). Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 04/23/2025

The single door reach-in refrigerator unit was observed with a frayed gasket. Equipment must remain in good repair and proper adjustment/per manufacturers instructions. New Violation. Correct By: 04/09/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the hood ventilation system has an accumulation of dust. Non-food contact surfaces must be cleaned as often as necessary. New Violation. Correct By: 04/09/2025

The following was observed: 1) The floors in the dry storage area has an accumulation of rodent droppings. 2) The ceiling tiles above the prep unit/oven were observed with an accumulation of dust/debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 04/09/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 09/08/2023

The door to the outside, located in the back kitchen area, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 09/08/2023
